meta.ministry: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions
meta.project_subject: Work Order to work in association with DARPG on actionable agendas as prioritized by the Department
meta.deliverables: The PMU team will coordinate production of documentary films for IIAS/CSD 2025, National e-Governance Awards, Special Campaign and Good Governance Week; create clips and design templates for Civil Services Day; develop content for two books to be released by the Hon'ble Prime Minister; organize and document Regional Conferences; handle media coordination including press releases and panel discussions; publish and disseminate the e-journal Minimum Government - Maximum Governance featuring shortlisted initiatives of PM Awards and National e-Governance Awards; draft agenda for review meetings and generate regular reports and publications as per pre-defined timelines; and undertake any other work assigned by senior officers on a day-to-day basis.

content.full_text: The Department of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances (DARPG), Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions, issued a work order to the Quality Council of India on 08/01/2025. The order approves QCI's proposal to work in association with DARPG on actionable agendas prioritized by the Department. A two-member PMU team will be set up from 08.01.2025 to 30.04.2025 to assist the division in coordination tasks including production of documentary films for IIAS/CSD 2025 and National e-Governance Awards, designing templates for Civil Services Day, developing content for books to be released by the Prime Minister, organizing Regional Conferences, handling media coordination, publishing the e-journal Minimum Government - Maximum Governance, drafting meeting agendas, generating reports, and performing any other tasks assigned by senior officers. The financials cover 80 man-days for two QCI professionals at Rs. 7,500 per man-day totaling Rs. 12,00,000 plus 12% administrative cost of Rs. 1,44,000, resulting in a total cost of Rs. 13,44,000 excluding GST.
